race.comment: Tough race but SEAFALL (10) looks a big price again for a mare in flying form. She's won her past two, too strong late at Mornington before surging up out wide at Bendigo and getting the job done again. Up in grade here but down in weight and can see her getting a similar run here. NATION'S CALL (12) should be ready third up. The fresh run when ridden cold was good, working early on speed from a wide gate at Caulfield last time. He looks to get a pretty easy time of it from the low gate here and will take catching. SLY BOOTS (7) worked home well fresh at Hawkesbury in a good BM88. He has the option to roll further forward here and has the class to take this out. NARBOLD (6) beat home NATION'S CALL last time and should strip fitter off a short spell there. BONIFACE (11) makes his local debut for the Price & Kent Jnr yard, watch the market for a lead.
